playwright_config.note: Standard viewport sufficient for header/footer bugs; wait_for visible used for modal bug #9.

bugs.report_text: The footer control buttons are stacking vertically instead of appearing horizontally in a row.
The end call button appears with an incorrect background color that does not match the design palette.
The microphone toggle button displays an incorrect background color that does not match the design system.
The header is hidden behind other page elements, making it inaccessible and obscured.
bugs.neg_code: <header className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/90 to-slate-800/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-slate-700/50 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center shadow-2xl">
bugs.pos_code: <header className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/90 to-slate-800/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-slate-700/50 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center shadow-2xl z-5">

bugs.report_text: The timer display text appears in an incorrect color, making it difficult to read against the dark background.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="text-2xl font-mono font-bold text-cyan-400 bg-slate-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-cyan-500/30">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="text-2xl font-mono font-bold text-cyan-40 bg-slate-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-cyan-500/30">

bugs.report_text: The duration label has excessive negative spacing below it, creating an unnatural visual gap in the header layout.
The participant name text is too dark and nearly invisible against the dark video overlay background.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-white text-xs font-semibold border border-slate-600/30">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-slate-700 text-xs font-semibold border border-slate-600/30">

bugs.report_text: The participant sidebar is locked to the screen edge and overlaps the video grid, obscuring video content.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="w-80 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-800/90 to-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-l border-slate-700/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="w-80 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-800/90 to-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-l border-slate-700/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl fixed right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-10">

bugs.report_text: The microphone settings label text is too dark and nearly invisible against the dark modal background.
The video grid displays only one video per row instead of multiple columns, and extends beyond the container boundaries with negative spacing.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex-1 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 overflow-y-auto pr-2 pb-2">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-3 overflow-y-auto pr-2 pb-2 -m-6">
